mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.sort_order, r.status, r.data_scope, r.remark FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort_order
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT dept_id FROM sys_role_dept WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
